Durgapur Steel Plant reserves the right to cancel an offer without EMD, if the EMD exemption clause is found not fulfilled. 11 . Banning of Business Dealings: As per Clause 17.6 and other references of Banning of SAIL S1 Document Version 01 12 . Contractor Safety Management(CSM): N/A. 13 . Adverse Report against a contractor ( if any ):: In case of any specific adverse report received against a Bidder by Employer, in respect of capabilities and / or performance of the tenderer during last three years preceding to the last day of the previous month in which applications (NIT) are invited, the bid of such Bidder is liable to be rejected as per Clause 6.11 of SAIL S1 Document Version 01. 14 . Anti Bribery Undertaking: As per Clause 9.1 D of SAIL S1 Document Version 01. 15 . Terms and Conditions: The following Terms & Conditions are part of the tender and the follow up Work Order /Contract Agreement : The applicable terms and conditions are : 1. SAIL S1 Document Version 01. https://srm.saildsp.co.in/irj/go/km/docs/documents/Public%20Documents /Service_Procurement/CD/SAIL_S1_Document_Version_01.pdf 2.Special Conditions of Contract https://srm.saildsp.co.in/irj/go/km/docs/documents/Public%20Documents /Service_Procurement/CD/Special_Conditions_of_Contract.pdf 3..Guidelines on Banning of Business Dealings shall be applicable to this Tender. Security Deposit: In place of Clause 6.13.1 of SAIL S1 Document Version 01, the following is applicable: 1.Security Deposit (SD) will be 3% (three percent) of the Order Value (excluding Taxes and Duties) to be submitted either through Payment Gateway or as Bank Guarantee (BG). 2.If SD is to be submitted in the form of BG, then BG has to be submitted to the Executing Authority . 3.If SD is to be submitted through Payment Gateway, the online receipt of the same has to be submitted to the Executing Authority. 4.In case, SD submitted (either through Payment Gateway or through BG) is less than that mentioned in the Work Order/Contract, the balance must be paid before start of job/services
